socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Lightning Golem that grants you increased attack and cast speed, and mana regeneration. socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian.
